metadata.description: Competitive intelligence skills powered by CompetLab — 13 skills covering lagging indicators (AI visibility, competitor dossiers, battlecards, weekly briefings, landscape analysis) + leading indicators (status, funding, hiring, agent adoption, product launches, customer voice, AI ecosystem) + an orchestrator that produces complete CMO-grade strategic briefings.

plugins.name: competlab-ci-skills
plugins.description: 13 competitive intelligence skills + orchestrator for CMO-grade strategic briefings. Backed by real monitoring data across AI Visibility, Tech & Trust, Content, Positioning, Pricing — plus on-demand research for status, funding, hiring, agent-readiness, product velocity, customer voice, and developer ecosystem.
